🎉 Happy Birthday 🎉

👩🏻‍⚖️ Future Judge Saheba 👩🏻‍⚖️

KANIKA ❤️

"Let the record show that on this auspicious day, a court of ultimate celebration is hereby summoned."

Court is now in session...

EXHIBIT A
Hard Work SUBMITTED

EXHIBIT C

EXHIBIT-L

SUBMISSION BY THE DEFENSE:

"Your Honor, the facts of this case are absolute. The subject, Kanika, stands accused of possessing an unparalleled intellect, a golden heart, and an ironclad determination to claim her place on the judicial bench."

"We submit that no punishment fits this crime other than the immediate pronouncement of a year filled with grand success, unwavering strength, and the ultimate realization of her judicial ambitions."

— Lead Counsel of the Birthday Council

EXHIBIT-W

DEPOSITION of THE WITNESSES (Family & Friends):

"We have observed Kanika staying up late, surrounded by massive volumes of law. Her focus is an inspiration. She reads, digests, and analyzes cases not just as a student, but with the analytical depth of an Hon'ble Judge."

"We witness that she is fair, incredibly wise, and has always stood up for what is right. We, the witnesses, urge this court to declare her the ultimate ruler of our hearts and the future custodian of justice."

— Sworn Depositions in Court Record

★
COURT OF CELEBRATION

⚖️ FINAL VERDICT ⚖️

IN THE COURT OF UNLIMITED BLESSINGS & CELEBRATION

Let it be known to all that on this Day of July 4th, 2026, the Bench hereby decrees:

Miss KANIKA is hereby declared

🎂 HAPPY BIRTHDAY 🎂

THE FUTURE HON'BLE JUDGE

"The Court has reviewed the extensive evidence of your hard work, late-night studies, dedication, and golden character. It is hereby ordered that you shall achieve every success in your journey, conquer all judicial exams, and ascend to the Bench with honor, integrity, and grace. May you write landmark judgements that shape the nation."
Chief Registrar of Destiny
DECREED
The Universe Upholder of Dreams

⚖️ CASE CLOSED ⚖️

Happy Birthday
Future Judge Saheba ❤️
